summary: Phase 7 UAT Testing Complete - All core features working. Comprehensive E2E testing of House of Veritas Digital Governance Platform including authentication, permissions, notifications, and all 4 persona dashboards.

issues: Footer shows '© 2025' instead of '© 2026' - minor date inconsistency

critical_code_review_comments: Password storage is in-memory only - passwords reset during runtime will be lost on server restart (expected for demo)
All external integrations (DocuSeal, Baserow, Twilio) are MOCKED - returning simulated data
seed_data_creation: Mock data seeded via baserow.ts and notification-context.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Password reset modifies in-memory passwords - restart server to reset. External services (DocuSeal, Baserow, Twilio) are MOCKED.

password_reset.sms_method: PASS - Generates new password, shows demoPassword (MOCKED SMS)
password_reset.email_method: PASS - Generates new password, shows demoPassword (MOCKED email)

dashboards.hans: PASS - Blue theme, budget chart, pending approvals, employee performance
dashboards.charl: PASS - Amber theme, time clock, workshop assets, task progress
dashboards.lucky: PASS - Green theme, garden tasks, expenses, weekly hours chart
dashboards.irma: PASS - Purple theme, household tasks, meal planning, task distribution

api_endpoints.GET /api/time: PASS - Returns time entries with summary

security.password_not_exposed: PASS - Password not in API responses

mocked_apis.docuseal: MOCKED - Returns mock templates and submissions
mocked_apis.baserow: MOCKED - Returns mock employees, tasks, expenses, assets, time entries, vehicle logs
